name: Table Lamp (Includes LED Light Bulb) - White - Cloud Island™: Ceramic Base, Rotary Switch, Drum Shade, 3-Way Settings
description:
Illuminate your baby's nursery or playroom with this Table Lamp from cloud island™. This white table lamp features a round ceramic base with starry cutouts on top that allow the light to pass through, and it comes with one LED bulb and a matching drum shade. The 3-way light setting produces three levels of light in low, medium and high. Simply place this lamp on any table or sideboard in their room for a warm glow.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
